rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow users to choose whether they are using the service center side or the car owner side.
The system shall allow service center users to register or log in if already registered.
The system shall allow service center users to enter damaged parts, update parts information, or send expiry-related notifications after logging in.
The system shall allow service center users to log out after finishing any of the above activities.
The system shall allow car owner users to register or log in.
The system shall allow car owners to view parts information, request or respond to services, or report a service center after logging in.
The system shall allow car owners to select required parts and make a payment when choosing a service.
The system shall allow car owners to log out after completing their activities.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows users to choose between using the service center side or the car owner side.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A person starts by choosing whether they are using the service center side or the car owner side.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Service center users can register or log in if already registered.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they are a service center, they can either register or log in if already registered.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After logging in, service center users can enter damaged parts, update parts information, or send expiry-related notifications.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After logging in, they reach their home area where they can enter damaged parts, update parts information, or send expiry-related notifications.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Service center users can log out after finishing any of the above activities.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After finishing any of these, they can continue using the system or log out.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Car owner users can register or log in.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they are a car owner, they can also register or log in.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After logging in, car owners can view parts information, request or respond to services, or report a service center.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After logging in, they reach their home area where they can view parts information, request or respond to services, or report a service center.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Car owners can select required parts and make a payment when choosing a service.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they choose a service, they can select the required parts and make a payment, and then continue.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Car owners can log out after completing their activities.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After completing their activities, they can log out, and it ends.
